text:
4-inch Shibari Suspension Bamboo
Shibari Supply describes shibari-grade suspension bamboo sold in nominal lengths from four to eight feet. The vendor says each pole is hand-selected, cut node-to-node, and flame-cured. Because bamboo is natural, its diameter is approximate at about 4 to 4.4 inches, the selected length may vary by a few inches, and the pole may taper from one end to the other. The eight-foot option is at most 90 inches unless the buyer arranges oversized freight before ordering. Poles usually ship directly from The Flaming Bamboo Company and may require up to two weeks of processing because they are typically harvested and cured to order. Shibari Supply warns that bamboo is a natural material and makes no guarantee of its safety, suitability, or longevity for any purpose.
title: 4-inch Shibari Suspension Bamboo
